_comment: Registry for the shared Material destructive-confirmation helper (docs/design/08-dialogs.md
8.1). It is a source-implementation ledger only: it does not claim a native build or runtime
pixel evidence. The helper composes the modal footer (Help | spacer | safe secondary |
destructive primary), carries the destructive-action role on the primary, and binds the safe
action as both the initial focus and the Enter default so keyboard activation can never destroy
data. 'migrations' lists the real weld::MessageDialog destructive confirmations converted to the
helper in this wave. Validate with bin/check-material-dialog-anatomy.py and

migrations.act: delete selected sheets that contain a pivot table
delete selected sheets that contain data
delete a draw/impress layer and all objects on it
overwrite an existing template of the same name in the category
delete a template category and its templates
